title: NEON_CUBES
description: The goal of the project is to create new decorations for the Minecraft game.
body:
- The neon cubes modification is designed as a functional decoration mod. 
- The entire goal of the project is to allow players to use decorations not only for decoration but also for, for example, lighting or movement acceleration.
- Anyone who wants to decorate their home with non-standard blocks will want this mod.
